question: The chart shows time allocation on a typical day. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Chores accounts for the largest share of the day.
options.B: Sleep and Leisure together account for more time than Chores.
options.C: Commute and Work together account for more time than Chores.
options.D: Sleep is the largest category by percentage.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Chores: 40%; Commute: 20%; Leisure: 18%; Work: 12%; Sleep: 10%.
